case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: ET AL

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $11,633.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
